Contracting Authority: Austrian Power Grid AG, Wagramer Straße 19, IZD-Tower, A-1220 Vienna
Project Description:
- Service Agreement: PMO services for Central Europe Capacity Calculation Region (CCR)
- Beneficiaries: 20 TSOs across Central Eastern and Central Western Europe
- Tasks: planning, meeting prep/moderation, stakeholder comms, budget mgmt, collaborative IT tools mgmt (ProjectPlace), contract/admin support, coordination; option to lead working groups
- Language: English (procedure and performance)
- Start: Q1/2025 (estimated Jan 2025)
- Procedure: Negotiated procedure (two-stage), above-threshold; no partial bids; no lots
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 2024-09-06 12:00 CET
- Call for tenders: Oct 2024; Tender submission: 2024-11-06
- Negotiations/presentations/hearings: 2024-11-18–22
- Award: 2024-12-18
- Service start: 2025-01

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- PMO for CE CCR: support joint TSO processes (e.g., Day-Ahead Capacity Calculation per Reg. (EU) 2015/1222 as amended), potential Long-Term/Intraday/Balancing and Regional Operation System Coordination
- Deliverables: project planning, meeting organization/moderation, stakeholder communication, budget control, collaborative tool administration (ProjectPlace), contract/admin support, coordination; may lead workgroups/deliverables
- Reporting: regular written reports to CE CCR Steering Group (CE SG)
- Tools: provide licensed Microsoft Teams (or equivalent) for teleconferences/screen sharing
- Meetings: organize/host/attend physical meetings in European cities
- Regulations to be fulfilled: (EU) 2024/1747; (EU) 2019/943; (EU) 2015/1222 (as amended by (EU) 2021/280); (EU) 2016/1719 (as amended by (EU) 2021/280); (EU) 2017/2195 (as amended by (EU) 2021/280); (EU) 2017/1485 (as amended by (EU) 2021/280); incl. derived methodologies and amendments
- Constraints: English as working language; no partial bids; two-stage negotiated procedure
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: Central Eastern and Central Western Europe
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- Compliance with EU Regulations: (EU) 2024/1747; 2019/943; 2015/1222 (as amended by 2021/280); 2016/1719 (as amended by 2021/280); 2017/2195 (as amended by 2021/280); 2017/1485 (as amended by 2021/280)
- Personnel language proficiency: English ≥ C1 (CEFR)
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia permitted; designate central coordinator (Form BEW + Annex BBE); ARGE with joint and several liability if awarded
- Subcontracting permitted (not entire contract); notify all intended/possible parts and all (sub-)subcontractors (Form SUT); evidence of availability (Annex SUE); reliance for finances requires Annex SUS (joint and several liability)
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Portal: http://apg.vemap.com only; QES required via trustDesk vemap; encrypted submission; server time binding
- Language: English; attachments in German or English; other languages need certified translation
- File types: all except executables (.exe, .php, .js)
- Support: +43 1 3157940; willkommen@vemap.com
- All communication and questions via the portal

Offer Submission Documents: Proof of non-existence of exclusion criteria (per 3.2)
Sales revenues statement (Form UMS) + insurance certificate per 4.2.3
Key Person (Form PER + Annex RPE) + CV
Statement of Consortium (Form BEW + Annex BBE) if applicable
Subcontractors (Form SUT + Annex SUE/SUS/VEB) if applicable
Letter of Comfort (Form PAT + Annex PAE) if relying
List of Documents: Insolvency file extract (§256 IO) or equivalent
GISA extract or equivalent authorisation proof
UMS backed by balance sheets/income statements
Client confirmations for references (Annex RUN) or applicant declaration
CV for key person and each employee pool member
Annex PAE Letter of Comfort (if relying on affiliates/third parties)
Annex SUS Joint and Several Liability (if relying on subcontractor finances)

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: Total net sales revenues ≥ EUR 2,000,000 (excl. VAT) in the branch of the tendered subject in each of the last 3 business years; valid public liability insurance ≥ EUR 1,000,000
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Sales in the branch of the tendered subject for each of the last 3 business years via Form UMS

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: GISA extract or equivalent; Companies’ Register extract; ANKÖ number if applicable
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Form EIG covering exclusion grounds (criminal offences, insolvency, taxes/social security, conflicts of interest, etc.)
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Form SUT + Annex SUE; Annex SUS for financial reliance; Annex VEB for changes; reliance on others not permitted for technical capability

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Key person (Form PER + Annex RPE): Master’s (or comparable); ≥5 years relevant experience; PM in ≥2 reference projects (per 4.3.2); profound knowledge of European electricity markets and EU regulations; English ≥ C1 (CEFR). CV required. Changes only with CE consent (limited exceptions).
- Employee pool: ≥4 qualified persons (≥4 FTE) in addition to key person; each with Master’s (or comparable), ≥1 year PMO services experience, English ≥ C1. Provide EMP details + CVs.
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Minimum team: key person + employee pool of ≥4 FTE
- Availability: attend/host physical meetings in European cities; project language English; regular reporting to CE SG
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects: - Company references (eligibility, mandatory): ≥2 projects of similar size/technical tasks; contract value ≥ EUR 150,000/year; PMO services in international electricity project or with international TSOs; duration ≥12 months; region EU/EEA incl. CH & GB; completion ≤3 years before notice (older not considered). Provide via REF + Annex RUN with client confirmation (or applicant declaration).

Company Referrals:
- Bidder references (eligibility): 2 as per 4.3.2 (≥ EUR 150,000/year; ≥12 months; EU/EEA incl. CH & GB; ≤3 years old)
- Selection references: up to 5 additional references (mark in Annex RUN). Scoring per type/value; no extra points for eligibility references reused.
Award Criteria:
- Selection stage (to invite up to 4): Further company references (max 5) = max 30 points
  • PMO in multi-TSO project (EU electricity markets, capacity calculation or system operation) with ≥4 serviced parties:
    - ≥ EUR 150,000/year: 6 pts; ≥ EUR 50,000 < 150,000/year: 5 pts
  • PMO in multiparty project (EU electricity markets and capacity calculation or system operation) with ≥4 serviced parties:
    - ≥ EUR 150,000/year: 4 pts; ≥ EUR 50,000 < 150,000/year: 3 pts
  • PMO in multiparty project in EU electricity sector:
    - ≥ EUR 50,000/year: 1 pt
- Tie rule: all with same score as 4th invited
- Note: Award criteria for negotiated phase may be adjusted; phased reduction of offers possible
